scripts.pack:npm: echo [打包] 生成 npm 发行包 && npm pack
scripts.pack:plugin: echo [发布] 清理旧 tgz 并重新打包插件 && del /q lain14138-realtime-background-assistant-*.tgz 2>nul & npm pack
scripts.publish:openclaw: echo [发布] 先卸载旧版本避免重复安装，再安装新包并校验 && (openclaw plugins uninstall realtime-background-assistant || echo [发布] 未检测到可卸载旧版本，继续) && npm run pack:plugin && for %f in (lain14138-realtime-background-assistant-*.tgz) do @openclaw plugins install %f && openclaw plugins inspect realtime-background-assistant --json
scripts.publish:openclaw:force: echo [发布] 跳过卸载直接安装（仅在你确认无冲突时使用） && npm run pack:plugin && for %f in (lain14138-realtime-background-assistant-*.tgz) do @openclaw plugins install %f && openclaw plugins inspect realtime-background-assistant --json
scripts.publish:npm: echo [发布] 先打包再发布到 npm registry && npm run pack:npm && npm publish --access public
